name: DAC_SPL_A01_BOLA_Suspicion
search: sourcetype=access_combined | stats dc(user_id) as distinct_users values(uri_path) as requested_paths by session_id, src_ip | where distinct_users > 10
description: OWASP A01:2025 - Detects Broken Object Level Authorization attempts via multiple user ID requests in a single session.

name: DAC_SPL_A01_SSRF_Metadata_Query
search: sourcetype=access_combined (uri_query="*127.0.0.1*" OR uri_query="*localhost*" OR uri_query="*169.254.169.254*") | stats count by src_ip, uri_path, uri_query
description: OWASP A01:2025 - Detects Server-Side Request Forgery (SSRF) attempts targeting internal infrastructure and AWS metadata endpoint.

name: DAC_SPL_A02_Directory_Listing
search: sourcetype=access_combined (uri_path="*/" AND (status=200 OR status=302)) "Index of /" | stats count by src_ip, uri_path
description: OWASP A02:2025 - Detects information disclosure via web server directory listing misconfiguration.

name: DAC_SPL_A02_External_Admin_Access
search: sourcetype=access_combined uri_path IN ("*/admin*", "*/config*", "*/dashboard*") NOT (src_ip IN ("10.0.0.0/8", "192.168.0.0/16", "172.16.0.0/12")) | stats count by src_ip, uri_path, status
description: OWASP A02:2025 - Monitors unauthorized external access requests targeting internal administrative interfaces.

name: DAC_SPL_A03_Supply_Chain_Malicious_Outbound
search: sourcetype=pan:traffic (src_ip IN (10.0.0.0/8) AND dest_port=443) NOT dest_ip IN (github.com, npmjs.org, pypi.org, maven.org) | stats count by src_ip, dest_ip
description: OWASP A03:2025 - Detects potential software supply chain compromise where environment pulls dependencies from rogue domains.

name: DAC_SPL_A04_Insecure_TLS_Ciphers
search: sourcetype=ssl_logs (tls_version="TLSv1.0" OR tls_version="TLSv1.1" OR tls_cipher_suite IN ("*RC4*", "*3DES*", "*MD5*")) | stats count by src_ip, dest_ip, tls_version
description: OWASP A04:2025 - Cryptographic Failures. Detects usage of broken TLS protocols and cipher suites vulnerable to MitM attacks.

name: DAC_SPL_A05_SQL_Injection_Patterns
search: sourcetype=access_combined (uri_query="*UNION*SELECT*" OR uri_query="*SELECT*FROM*" OR uri_query="*OR*1=1*") | stats count by src_ip, uri_path, uri_query
description: OWASP A05:2025 - Detects common SQL Injection payload patterns passing through web application parameters.

name: DAC_SPL_A05_Command_Injection_Attempts
search: sourcetype=access_combined (uri_query="*etc/passwd*" OR uri_query="*bin/sh*" OR uri_query="*whoami*" OR uri_query="*cmd.exe*") | stats count by src_ip, uri_path, uri_query
description: OWASP A05:2025 - Detects OS Command Injection payloads aiming to execute native binary commands on the host.

name: DAC_SPL_A05_XSS_Reflected_Payloads
search: sourcetype=access_combined (uri_query="*<script>*" OR uri_query="*javascript:*" OR uri_query="*onerror=*") | stats count by src_ip, uri_path
description: OWASP A05:2025 - Detects cross-site scripting (XSS) script tags inject attempts inside URL queries.

name: DAC_SPL_A07_Credential_Stuffing_Spam
search: sourcetype=app_login status=failed | stats dc(user) as distinct_users count as failed_count by src_ip | where failed_count > 20 AND distinct_users > 5
description: OWASP A07:2025 - Detects Credential Stuffing / Password Spraying attacks where a single IP tests multiple accounts.

name: DAC_SPL_A07_Brute_Force_Exploit_Success
search: sourcetype=app_login | transaction src_ip maxpause=5m status IN (failed, success) | search status=failed AND status=success
description: OWASP A07:2025 - Identifies a successful brute-force attack characterized by a success event after numerous failures.

name: DAC_SPL_A08_Insecure_Deserialization_Signals
search: sourcetype=access_combined (uri_query="*rO0AB*" OR uri_query="*O:4:*" OR body="*T2JqZWN0*") | stats count by src_ip, uri_path
description: OWASP A08:2025 - Detects base64/hex patterns typical of insecure object deserialization (Java/PHP/.NET) in payloads.

name: DAC_SPL_A09_Audit_Log_Tampering
search: sourcetype=linux_secure (command="*rm*-rf*/var/log*" OR command="*service*syslog*stop*" OR command="*systemctl*stop*auditd*") | stats count by user, host
description: OWASP A09:2025 - Detects threat actors attempting to clear tracks or stop local log forwarding systems.

name: DAC_SPL_A10_Verbose_Error_Stack_Leaks
search: sourcetype=access_combined (body="*java.lang.NullPointerException*" OR body="*Exception in thread*" OR body="*SqlException*") | stats count by uri_path, status
description: OWASP A10:2025 - Detects application errors that leakage internal code stack traces, exposing system internals.

name: DAC_SPL_A10_High_Rate_HTTP_5xx_Anomaly
search: sourcetype=access_combined status>=500 | bucket _time span=5m | stats count as error_count by _time, src_ip, uri_path | where error_count > 100
description: OWASP A10:2025 - Identifies aggressive application fuzzing or denial of service targeting dynamic features.
